title: Sidebar fork action fails silently and navigates to Projects page
description: Clicking 'Fork' from the sidebar context menu on a conversation does not create a forked session. Instead, the app navigates to the Projects page. No error message is shown, no new '(fork)' conversation appears in the sidebar. The fork appears to silently fail.
steps: Open chat view with conversations in sidebar
Hover over a conversation to reveal the '...' menu button
Click the menu button, then click 'Fork'
Observe: app navigates to Projects page, no fork created
expected: A new forked conversation should appear in the sidebar with '(fork)' suffix, and the user should remain in the chat view
actual: App navigates to Projects page, no forked conversation is created

title: No per-message 'Fork Here' button exists for checkpoint-based forking
description: The story expects a 'Fork Here' button on individual messages to create a branch from a specific point in the conversation. This UI does not exist. Fork is only available via the sidebar context menu (which forks the entire session). CheckpointTimeline and RewindDialog components exist in code but are only for code/workspace sessions with git checkpoints, not for arbitrary message-level forking in plain chat.
steps: Open a conversation with multiple messages
Hover over individual messages looking for fork/branch controls
Observe: no per-message fork button exists
expected: A 'Fork Here' button on messages allowing branching from a specific point
actual: No per-message fork UI. Fork is only in sidebar context menu (session-level).

title: Sidebar fork does not show confirmation or RewindDialog
description: When clicking Fork from the sidebar context menu, no confirmation dialog or RewindDialog is shown. The action fires immediately (though it fails). A RewindDialog component exists in the codebase but is not wired to the sidebar fork action.
steps: Open sidebar context menu on a conversation
expected: A confirmation dialog or RewindDialog should appear before forking
actual: No dialog shown; action fires immediately

title: ChatPage crash fix verified — conversations load without error
description: The previously-blocking ChatPage crash (missing sessionInfo destructuring) has been fixed. Clicking on conversations in the sidebar now loads them correctly without triggering ErrorBoundary. Tested with 'Crispy Meadow' and 'Classic Vanilla Butter Cake Recipe' conversations. No console errors observed.
